body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Ecology/Animism — biophilia, nature connectedness, environmental neuroscience, neurobiophilia.

**Biophilia as Evolutionary Adaptation: An Onto- and Phylogenetic Framework for Biophilic Design.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 34367025. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2021.700709. Biophilia is ahuman personality trait described initially by Erich Fromm and later by E.O. Wilson, both of whom agree that biophilia has abiological basis and that it is fundamental to develop harmonious relationships between humans and the biosphere. This review aims at establishing adefinition of biophilia as an evolutionary process.
